name: Dog Sitter
description: The dogs of the people on the street ran away.Look for them in the garden of the house and catch them.Then hand it back to its owners and do your duty.The more dogs you chase, the more points you get.
instructions: Tap and catch dogs that spawn in random locations every 1 second
tags: 1 Player, 2D, Action, Adventure, Animal, Arcade, Baby, Best, Boy, Girl
